title: tokenized_by composition
manager: `tokenized_by` — compose one machine's output as another's tokenized input, so a lexer-machine can feed a parser-machine, or any producer can drive any consumer through a typed token stream. This is a composition primitive: it lets you build a pipeline of machines where each stage's output alphabet becomes the next stage's input, with the handoff checked for compatibility instead of hoped-for.
cs: `tokenized_by` composition (§14); output-to-tokenized-input wiring; alphabet compatibility checked; a building block for multi-machine systems.
